calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for and with Robert Henninger (Petitioner)

Mr. Sarreshtehdary stated that he has not received any responses to the publication made on 10/25/18 in a South Korea publication called "Money Talk," as suggested by heirsearch.com and believes that reasonable due diligence has been carried out in South Korea. The Court granted the petition for order confirming trust assets (order is signed).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for and with Robert Henninger (Petitioner).

The Court noted that this matter was continued to make sure a diligent search for potential heirs was done. Mr. Sarreshtehdary stated that they are waiting for the heir search company to obtain family relationships, that it is very difficult to obtain information due to privacy laws in Korea, that he was told the search typically takes six months to one year, and that they spoke of publication in Korea as another option. Mr. Sarreshtehdary also stated that the cost for publication in Korea can be $240.00 to $300.00 (US dollars) per run, that he is not sure if publication in Korea is done the same as it is here, that he can get more information as to how Korean publication is done and that in his view publication is an appropriate step to take. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to November 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if anything comes back. Any supplemental filings are due by November 15, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Continued To Oct-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for and with Robert Henninger (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the assets are properly listed in the Trust, questions whether something should be done to see if there are any intestate heirs and asked if any form of search has been done. Mr. Sarreshtehdary stated that they have not hired a genealogy company, that he has no knowledge of any search and that they are going on the longstanding knowledge of the Client. Mr. Sarreshtehdary also stated that it was mentioned that the Decedent had two Brothers, that both of the Brothers passed away and that he is not aware if they had any issue. Mr. Henninger stated that he has no idea if there are any issue and that they would be in Korea. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is continued to October 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to determine if anyone else is entitled to notice. The Court informed Counsel that it can not reach the merits of the petition without knowing if everyone has gotten notice. Any further supplemental filings are to be filed by October 4, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
